title: andrographis cordifolia
intro: Andrographis cordifolia, also known as King of Bitters, is a plant native to India and Southeast Asia, scientifically classified as a member of the Acanthaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Andrographis cordifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and improving digestive health. Andrographis cordifolia is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
